_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Marcelo Mayer scratched with back and neck spasms Wednesday vs Rays
items.snark: Kid finally finds something at the plate with new mechanics, immediately wakes up unable to move his neck.

items.headline: Jake Bennett recalled from Worcester to start Wednesday finale at Tampa
items.snark: Bello's in Worcester working on joy, Bennett's back working on not letting the Rays hang five more.

items.headline: Red Sox swept by Rays, now 11 games under .500 for first time since 2000
items.snark: Team that went to the Super Bowl last year is 11 under, ownership calling teams like a drunk uncle at Thanksgiving.

items.headline: Drake Maye sharp at minicamp Day 2, back-shoulder fade to AJ Brown highlight
items.snark: Maye dropping dimes to Brown in June, which is basically a ring parade if you squint at OTA footage.
